title: Regression in lint check ("Wide Op w/ no temp" internal error)
body:
Commit 4f36e3e causes a regression when linting the "OTBN" block in OpenTitan. To reproduce:
```
git clone https://github.com/lowRISC/opentitan.git
cd opentitan
git checkout -b tst 77d8c98a78a668d0c7ea87ef0f84367f5cf8c656  # This is HEAD at the moment: probably other versions show it
fusesoc --cores-root=. run --target=lint --setup --build lowrisc:ip:otbn_top_sim
```
Alternatively, I've packed up the relevant code and attached it here: [verilator-bug.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/6502640/verilator-bug.tar.gz).

Download it and then run `test.sh` from the unpacked directory.

Before this commit, the lint job runs with no warnings. Afterwards:
```
> ./test.sh 
%Error: Internal Error: ../src/lowrisc_ip_otbn_top_sim_0.1/otbn_top_sim.sv:103:55: ../V3EmitC.cpp:2056: Wide Op w/ no temp, perhaps missing op in V3EmitC?
  103 |     assign dmem_rdata_nointeg[i*32 +: 32] = dmem_rdata[i*39 +: 32];
      |                                                       ^
                        ... See the manual and https://verilator.org for more assistance.
```
code_blocks:
> ./test.sh 
%Error: Internal Error: ../src/lowrisc_ip_otbn_top_sim_0.1/otbn_top_sim.sv:103:55: ../V3EmitC.cpp:2056: Wide Op w/ no temp, perhaps missing op in V3EmitC?
  103 |     assign dmem_rdata_nointeg[i*32 +: 32] = dmem_rdata[i*39 +: 32];
      |                                                       ^
                        ... See the manual and https://verilator.org for more assistance.
